micro_blocks.name: HeadlineSubheadLockup
micro_blocks.purpose: Paired headline and subhead with consistent typographic hierarchy and spacing.
micro_blocks.notes: The most reused primitive. Eyebrow is optional — use for category, product line, or stage framing. Alignment inherits from parent module but can be overridden.

micro_blocks.name: CTACluster
micro_blocks.purpose: One or two CTA buttons with correct hierarchy. Manages spacing and visual weight between primary and secondary actions.
micro_blocks.notes: Never render two primary-weight buttons together. secondary is always lower visual weight. inline for desktop default; stacked for mobile or when copy length diverges.

micro_blocks.name: CTAButton
micro_blocks.purpose: Single action trigger. Handles label, href, and visual variant.
micro_blocks.notes: variant maps to visual weight, not action type. primary is filled. secondary is outlined. ghost is text-only. Size defaults to md. Use lg in hero contexts only.

micro_blocks.name: MediaFrame
micro_blocks.purpose: Container for image or video content with aspect ratio and overflow control.
micro_blocks.notes: loading defaults to lazy except in hero position above the fold. caption is optional and styled as small/muted. Use eager only for the first hero image.

micro_blocks.name: TrustSignal
micro_blocks.purpose: Short friction-reducing string placed near a CTA. Reduces conversion anxiety.
micro_blocks.notes: Examples: 'No credit card required', '14-day free trial', 'Cancel anytime'. Keep under 40 characters. Optional icon (lock, checkmark) can reinforce message but is not required.

micro_blocks.name: FeatureCard
micro_blocks.purpose: Icon, headline, and description unit. Single capability statement.
micro_blocks.notes: Icon is an icon name or SVG reference — not decorative, should reinforce the feature category. Description should be 1–2 sentences max. Write for outcome, not feature name.

micro_blocks.name: GridLayout
micro_blocks.purpose: Responsive grid container. Handles column count and gap across breakpoints.
micro_blocks.notes: collapse_at defines the breakpoint at which columns collapse to single-column. Default is md. gap defaults to md.

micro_blocks.name: LogoStrip
micro_blocks.purpose: Horizontal array of brand logos. Used for customer or partner social proof.
micro_blocks.notes: style defaults to grayscale — keeps visual weight neutral and avoids brand conflicts. full-color only when logos are a selling point (e.g., enterprise marquee names). max_display caps visible logos; overflow is hidden, not paginated.

micro_blocks.name: QuoteBlock
micro_blocks.purpose: Styled quotation text with proper typographic treatment.
micro_blocks.notes: Opening quotation mark is a visual element, not a text character — handled in CSS. size lg for featured testimonials. size sm for inline quotes within ContentSection. Do not truncate quotes with ellipsis.

micro_blocks.name: AuthorLockup
micro_blocks.purpose: Name, title, company, and optional photo attribution block.
micro_blocks.notes: Always include name + title + company minimum for Validator credibility. photo is circular crop. company_logo is displayed at small size beside or below name. Don't use both photo and company_logo simultaneously — pick one.

micro_blocks.name: StatUnit
micro_blocks.purpose: Single metric composed of a large value and a descriptive label.
micro_blocks.notes: value should be formatted before passing in (e.g., '10,000+', '3.2x', '$2M'). label is supporting context. source is a citation string — always include for Validator contexts. source renders as small/muted below label.

micro_blocks.name: StatGrid
micro_blocks.purpose: Grid container for StatUnit clusters. Handles even distribution and responsive collapse.
micro_blocks.notes: dividers adds visual separators between StatUnit cells. Default true for 4-col, optional for 3-col. Collapses to 2-col on mobile, single-col on xs.

micro_blocks.name: PriceDisplay
micro_blocks.purpose: Price value, billing period, and optional discount badge.
micro_blocks.notes: original_price enables strikethrough for discounted pricing. badge is a small overlay label (e.g., 'Most Popular', 'Save 20%'). Price should already be formatted including currency symbol.

micro_blocks.name: FeatureList
micro_blocks.purpose: Checkmark list of plan inclusions or feature entitlements.
micro_blocks.notes: icon defaults to check. Use x for features explicitly excluded from a plan (comparison tables). max_display truncates with 'Show more' — use only on mobile. Keep feature strings short; this is a scan-optimized component.

micro_blocks.name: BodyCopy
micro_blocks.purpose: Long-form rich text container. Handles structured prose with subheadings, lists, and inline elements.
micro_blocks.notes: max_width defaults to prose (~65ch) for readability. wide for layouts with adjacent elements. Supports subheadings (h2, h3), lists, and inline links within content. Do not use for UI labels or feature descriptions — those belong in FeatureCard.

micro_blocks.name: LogoMark
micro_blocks.purpose: Brand logo mark with controlled sizing and link wrapping.
micro_blocks.notes: Always wraps in an anchor tag linking to home. size sm for footer, md for navigation, lg reserved for standalone brand moments. alt should describe the brand, not say 'logo'.

micro_blocks.name: NavLinks
micro_blocks.purpose: Navigation link group, optionally structured in columns for footer use.
micro_blocks.notes: inline for navigation bar. column for footer columns. heading is optional — used in footer column groups. children enables one level of dropdown in nav. Do not nest deeper than one level.

micro_blocks.name: LegalCopy
micro_blocks.purpose: Small legal, copyright, and disclaimer text.
micro_blocks.notes: Renders at the smallest typographic size. alignment defaults to center for minimal footer, left for standard. Keep to one line where possible. Includes copyright symbol and year by convention.
